---
title: "Research"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("R/render-pubs.R")
```

## Book

::: {.book-feature}

::: {.book-covers}
<figure>
![](images/book/cover-published.jpg)
<figcaption class="book-caption">Published cover</figcaption>
</figure>
<figure>
![](images/book/cover-alternate.jpg)
<figcaption class="book-caption">Alternate (unpublished) cover</figcaption>
</figure>
:::

**The Origins of Great Power Rivalries**
Cambridge University Press — *in press, March 2026*

<!-- Replace this description with the book blurb. -->
A short description of the book goes here: the central question, the argument,
and why it matters for how we understand great-power competition. Two or three
sentences is plenty — it sits right under the covers and above the video.

<!-- Replace the URL below with your book talk / trailer. The player box
     appears automatically once the link is a real YouTube URL. -->
{{< video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YOUR_VIDEO_ID >}}

:::

## Published Articles

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_pubs("published")
```

## Policy & Commentary

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_pubs("policy_commentary")
```

## Select Working Papers

```{r, results='asis', echo=FALSE}
render_pubs("working_papers")
```
